svg.text: Session object — the spine. LLM decides nothing here.
🔒 RLS: user_id = auth.uid() on ALL tables — each learner sees only their own data
"Two systems that work differently cannot parse each other's output; the interface is the
4 Pillars (WHAT the agreement is made of):
1. common_language — shared form both sides read
4. contract — agreed meaning of the exchange
surface_trap: naming the object (screen, knob, endpoint) AS the interface instead of the agreement
• Transition logic + hard cap (2 attempts per seam)
• Questioner — 1 call, phrasing a Socratic question
